autonomy_budget.summary: Recorded the frontline testing decision model and completed the first two shallow frontline trials without exceeding the default bounded run budget.

delta_summary: ADF now carries the recorded frontline testing decision model plus completed healthy-path and symptom-classification trials for `ASMS UI is down`, and the current next move is to plan one safe reversible shallow-fault validation.
handoff_summary: ADF now records the frontline testing decision model in plain language so future swarm runs can judge methods by support usefulness instead of technical depth alone.
The healthy-path trial and the symptom-classification trial for `ASMS UI is down` both passed and both stayed shallow.

The accepted symptom-classification result showed localhost serving `/algosec/` and `/algosec-ui/login` cleanly while `httpd` and `algosec-ms` stayed active, so the case was reclassified as external path or browser-side trouble rather than local UI startup failure.
The accepted delegated bundle was pulled back through `adf-dev` and reviewed successfully.
The next recommended move is to plan one safe reversible shallow-fault validation, likely around `httpd` or one core ASMS service, before any mutation-backed test is attempted.
highest_risk_observation: Highest risk: `canonical_state_integrity` still has not run locally, so keep this memory advisory and continue to trust canonical pack state first.

memory_tier.summary: Pack-local restart memory for the current shallow frontline testing phase.

memory_validity.summary: Low-confidence active pack restart memory with 12h freshness window.

summary_lines: Do not let frontline `ASMS UI is down` trials drift into deeper auth/bootstrap or downstream module work before the shallow path actually fails.
Do not move to controlled shallow-fault trials until the healthy and symptom-classification phases are already proving useful.

recommended_next_action: Recommended next action: plan one safe reversible shallow-fault validation for `ASMS UI is down`, likely around `httpd` or one core ASMS service, now that the first two shallow frontline phases have both proven useful.
summary: This restart memory captures the recorded frontline testing decision model, the successful symptom-classification trial for `ASMS UI is down`, and the shift to safe shallow-fault planning as the next testing step.
